org.kink_lang.kink.hostfun.CallFlowToOn

Packages that use CallFlowToOn
Package
Description
org.kink_lang.kink.hostfun
Interfaces used to make a host fun, which is a FunVal to perform action in Java code.

  • Uses of CallFlowToOn in org.kink_lang.kink.hostfun

    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    CallFlowToArgs
    Call flow step to bind args.
    interface 
    CallFlowToRecv
    Call flow step to bind a recv.
    Methods in org.kink_lang.kink.hostfun that return CallFlowToOn
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CallFlowToOn
    CallFlowToArgs.args()
    Binds no args to the flow.
    CallFlowToOn
    CallFlowToArgs.args(Val arg0)
    Binds one arg to the flow.
    CallFlowToOn
    CallFlowToArgs.args(Val... args)
    Binds the args to the flow.
    CallFlowToOn
    CallFlowToArgs.args(Val arg0, Val arg1)
    Binds two args to the flow.
    CallFlowToOn
    CallFlowToArgs.args(Val arg0, Val arg1, Val arg2)
    Binds the three args to the flow.
    CallFlowToOn
    CallFlowToArgs.args(Val arg0, Val arg1, Val arg2, Val arg3)
    Binds the four args to the flow.
    CallFlowToOn
    CallFlowToArgs.args(Val arg0, Val arg1, Val arg2, Val arg3, Val arg4)
    Binds the five args to the flow.
    CallFlowToOn
    HostContext.call(GraphNode graph)
    Returns a call flow to evaluate the graph.
